This reflects status of builds and checks.\n 4. get_files - Get the list of files changed in a pull request. Use with pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.\n 5. get_review_comments - Get review threads on a pull request. Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews. teach Archie to compare against GA baseline before flagging breaking changes (#37840)\\n\\nArchie was incorrectly flagging beta-only API removals as breaking\\nchanges (e.g., in\\n[#37650](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/37650)) because\\nthe API report marks everything as `// @public` — no `@beta` TSDoc tags\\nare used in this repo.\\n\\n### Fix\\n\\nAdds instructions to the architecture review guidelines and workflow to\\nuse `git tag` to find the last GA release and compare API reports before\\nflagging breaking changes:\\n\\n1. `git tag -l '@azure/\\u003cpkg\\u003e_*' | grep -v beta | sort -V | tail -1` →\\nfind GA tag\\n2. `git show \\\"\\u003ctag\\u003e:sdk/.../review/*.api.md\\\"` → retrieve GA API surface\\n3. Only flag as breaking if the removed API existed in the GA report\\n\\nThis is the same approach a human reviewer would use — deterministic and\\nprecise.\\n\\n### Also\\n\\nRecompiles `archie.lock.yml` with gh-aw v0.64.0.\\n\\n---------\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot All test failures occur exclusively in **live/AAD test mode** — none are reproducible locally without Azure credentials. The communication-identity and communication-short-codes failures are marked **recurring** (pre-existing), while the attestation failures are **new** (22 new failures).\n\n---\n\n## Failures\n\n### `@azure/attestation`\n\n**Failing tests (22 new failures, check run [68686295192](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/runs/68686295192)):**\n- `[AAD] Attestation Client \u003e #AttestOpenEnclaveShared`\n- `[AAD] Attestation Client \u003e #AttestOpenEnclaveAad`\n- `[AAD] Attestation Client \u003e #AttestOpenEnclaveIsolated`\n- `[AAD] Attestation Client \u003e #AttestSgxEnclaveShared`\n- *(and ~18 additional AAD-mode attestation tests)*\n\n**Stats:** 22 failed / 190 passed / 212 total (10.38% failure rate)\n\n**Error:**\n```\nAttestationToken is not yet valid.\n```\n\n**Root cause:**\nThe live attestation service returns JWT tokens with an `nbf` (not-before) claim that is more than 10 seconds ahead of the CI runner's clock. In `sdk/attestation/attestation/test/utils/recordedClient.ts` the client is configured with:\n```ts\nvalidateNotBeforeTime: !isPlaybackMode(),\ntimeValidationSlack: 10, // 10 seconds slack in validation time.\n```\nAnd in `src/models/attestationToken.ts` the check is:\n```ts\nif (nbfTime \u003e timeNow) {\n  const delta = nbfTime - timeNow;\n  if (delta \u003e (options.timeValidationSlack ?? 0)) {\n    problems.push(\"AttestationToken is not yet valid.\");\n  }\n}\n```\nThe 10-second `timeValidationSlack` is no longer sufficient — the clock skew between CI runners and the attestation service now exceeds this threshold.\n\n**Suggested fix:**\nIncrease `timeValidationSlack` in `recordedClient.ts` to a larger value (e.g., 30–60 seconds), or widen the slack only when running in CI:\n\n```diff\n--- a/sdk/attestation/attestation/test/utils/recordedClient.ts\n+++ b/sdk/attestation/attestation/test/utils/recordedClient.ts\n@@ ... @@\n         validateNotBeforeTime: !isPlaybackMode(),\n-        timeValidationSlack: 10, // 10 seconds slack in validation time.\n+        timeValidationSlack: 60, // 60 seconds slack to handle CI clock skew.\n```\n(The same change appears in two places in `recordedClient.ts`, at approximately lines 78–80 and 112–113.)\n\n**Reproduced locally:** No (live AAD test, requires Azure credentials)\n\n---\n\n### `@azure/communication-identity`\n\n**Failing tests (12 recurring failures, check run [68682302045](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/runs/68682302045)):**\n- `Get Token For Teams User [Playback/Live] \u003e *` (multiple parameterized variants)\n- `Get Token For Teams User [Playback/Live] [AAD] \u003e *` (multiple parameterized variants)\n\n**Test file:** `sdk/communication/communication-identity/test/public/node/getTokenForTeamsUser.node.spec.ts`\n\n**Stats:** 12 failed / 509 passed / 641 total (1.87% failure rate, all recurring)\n\n**Error:**\n```\ninvalid_grant: Error(s): 5000224 - Timestamp: 2026-03-26 09:14:47Z\nDescription: AADSTS5000224: We are sorry, this resource is not available.\nIf you are seeing this message by mistake, please contact Microsoft support.\nTrace ID: 97f8975a-d085-407d-aa3d-8dff81751700\n```\n\n**Root cause:**\nThe Azure AD tenant/resource used for `Get Token For Teams User` live tests returns `AADSTS500022
